name: Desert Financial Credit Union - ASU West ATM
description_short: Desert Financial Credit Union's ASU West ATM provides 24/7 cash access as part of the credit union's broader branch and ATM network across Phoenix.
description_long: Desert Financial Credit Union is a full-service financial institution offering comprehensive banking, lending, investment, and insurance products to its members. The ASU West ATM is one of multiple ATM locations operated by Desert Financial across the Phoenix area, designed to provide convenient cash access to credit union members and the broader community. The credit union operates branches and standalone ATMs at various locations including community colleges and commercial areas, with most ATMs available 24/7. Beyond ATM services, Desert Financial provides checking and savings accounts, auto loans, mortgages, personal loans, credit cards, investment services, and business banking solutions. The ASU West ATM specifically serves the Arizona State University West campus area as a walk-up ATM with round-the-clock availability. Desert Financial's approach emphasizes member convenience through digital banking tools like Zelle transfers, bill pay, and online account management, alongside traditional branch and ATM services. The credit union positions itself as a community-focused institution with educational resources, member giveback programs, and financial wellness support. For consumers seeking basic ATM access near ASU West, this location provides reliable 24/7 service without transaction fees for members, though non-members may face charges depending on their bank's ATM network agreements.
pros: 24/7 ATM access with no stated fees for credit union members
Walk-up ATM format available at ASU West location for convenient pedestrian access
Part of broader Desert Financial network with multiple ATM locations across Phoenix
Member support phone line available at (602) 433-7000 for account issues
Integrated with full-service credit union offering checking, savings, loans, and investments
Digital banking integration with Zelle and bill pay for account management
Community-focused institution with member giveback and referral programs
cons: Limited to ATM-only services at ASU West location; no in-person branch staff or extended services available
May have out-of-network ATM fees for non-members or members using other bank ATMs
Credit union membership required to avoid potential surcharges; eligibility criteria not detailed on location page
No deposit services, safe deposit boxes, or loan processing available at this specific ATM location
best_for: ASU West students and faculty who are Desert Financial credit union members needing 24/7 cash access
Credit union members in the Phoenix area seeking convenient ATM network access near campus
Individuals seeking basic cash withdrawal services without branch visit requirements
diagnosis: This ATM is best for Desert Financial credit union members at or near ASU West campus who need reliable 24/7 cash access without visiting a full branch. The main caveat is that this is an ATM-only location with no staff or services; members needing deposits, loans, or account assistance must visit a full branch or use online banking.
services: Digital banking integration for account management
Access to broader Desert Financial branch network for deposits and services
Zelle money transfer through linked online banking
Bill pay services through online banking
Debit card access for card-based transactions
